title: RapidLeaves
description:
Automatic Detection: Detects when a tree has been fully chopped down
Realistic Falling: Leaves fall gradually and randomly
Highly Configurable: All parameters are adjustable
body:
# Welcome to RapidLeaves!
This revolutionary plugin enhances the tree-cutting experience in Minecraft, making it more immersive and exciting. Say goodbye to chopping logs one by one—cutting down a tree now feels natural and dynamic with this plugin.

## Installation
Place the RapidLeaves.jar file in your server's plugins/ folder
Restart your server

Edit the configuration file at plugins/RapidLeaves/config.yml if needed
Use /rapidleaves reload to apply changes without restarting

## Plugin Features
Automatic Detection: Recognizes when a tree has been fully chopped down
Realistic Falling: Leaves fall gradually and randomly
Highly Configurable: Every setting can be adjusted to your liking
Full Compatibility: Works with all tree types in Minecraft 1.21.5
Optimized: Includes safety limits to prevent lag
Natural Drops: Falling leaves can drop items as usual

## Main Configuration
leaf-decay-delay: Time (in ticks) before leaves start to fall
leaf-decay-interval: Time between each wave of falling leaves
max-leaf-search-radius: Maximum radius to search for leaves
max-leaves-per-wave: Maximum number of leaves falling per wave
enable-leaf-drops: Whether falling leaves should drop items

## Permissions
rapidleaves.admin: Allows use of admin commands (default: OP)

## Commands
/rapidleaves: Displays plugin information
/rapidleaves reload: Reloads the configuration
